title: Swarm channel connection state is derived from the Bee node's /health endpoint.
content:
## Claim
The Swarm channel's `ConnectionState` is a direct projection of Bee node health probes.

## Mapping (from source)
| Bee Status | Channel State |
|---|---|
| `/health` returns 200 | `connected` |
| `/health` fails | `reconnecting` |
| Multiple failures | `error` |
| Bee URL changed | `connecting` |
| Channel shutdown | `disconnected` |

## Why this is useful
- UI components subscribing to `onConnectionStateChange` can render status without custom Bee-health logic.
- Push is gated on `connected`; in `error` state, operations accumulate in PGlite safely.
- Reconnect flow (`error → connected`) triggers catch-up push automatically.

## Source
Swarm Channel Architecture, "Connection State" table; `adapter/src/channel/swarm-channel.ts`.
description: Bee /health 200 maps to connected; failures map to reconnecting; repeated failures to error; URL change to connecting; shutdown to disconnected.
